labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 532210 ($573,044,345) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 532210 ($5,738,672,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

occupations.title: Laborers and Freight, Stock, and Material Movers, Hand
Mobile Heavy Equipment Mechanics, Except Engines
First-Line Supervisors of Retail Sales Workers
Bus and Truck Mechanics and Diesel Engine Specialists

n_band.derivation: margin 0.3000 (margins.json[532]: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results); revenue/employee $248,470 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 532210); class <5: 242 firms, avg revenue/firm $498,298 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $149,489 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 89 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,149,640 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $344,892 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 44 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,357,545 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $707,264 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 64 firms, avg revenue/firm $5,588,906 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,676,672 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 19 firms, avg revenue/firm $31,262,895 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $9,378,868 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 8 firms, avg revenue/firm $557,543,625 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $167,263,088 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 83
n_band.margin_source: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results
